children.text: FAQs
GoToWebinar
Why can't I join the webinar?

First, make sure you've registered for the webinar using the registration link you received from the organizer of the Webinar. The registration link was likely sent by email or a calendar invite.

 After you register you will receive a confirmation email from GoToWebinar. This email includes a link to the Webinar. To join the Webinar, click this link before the Webinar is scheduled to begin.

 If the webinar didn't begin, contact the organizer to find out if the session was rescheduled or canceled, or if theres a recording you can watch.
Is this answer helpful?
How do I find a webinar ID?

Look for the webinar ID in the confirmation email you received from the organizer, or in your calendar invite. The confirmation email also includes a link you can click to automatically join your session.

 If you still can't find the webinar ID, contact the organizer (for security reasons, we're unable to provide the ID).
Is this answer helpful?
I'm having trouble with audio
Check your network connection. If you have a strong connection (WiFi or mobile) and audio quality is still poor, switch to the phone call option available in the audio section of the app.
Is this answer helpful?
My webinar says "Waiting for organizer"

This means the organizer hasn't started the Webinar yet. Hold tight until the session starts. When the session starts, you'll be connected automatically.

 If you've been waiting for a while, contact the organizer to find out if the webinar will begin soon, or if it has been rescheduled or canceled.
Is this answer helpful?
I can't see the shared screen

If you can hear the session but don't see anything, there might not be anyone sharing their screen yet. Instead, you'll see a window with the message "Waiting to view <Presenter>'s screen". Once someone starts sharing, you'll see their screen in this window. In the meantime, you should still be able to hear the audio conference.

 If there's an issue with the slide deck freezing during the webinar, check your internet connection, or contact the organizer to find out if there's a recording you can view later.
Is this answer helpful?
I can't leave or close the webinar.
To leave the webinar, tap the Leave button in the upper left corner of the app. If that doesn't work, you can force-quit the app.
Is this answer helpful?
How much data will be used by GoToWebinar?

Data use can vary widely based on the content of the Webinar. To reduce data usage, disable webcam feeds and/or switch from internet audio to the phone call option in the audio section of the app. To avoid cellular data use entirely, use a wifi connection.
Is this answer helpful?
